name: Rental Contract Summary
query:
SELECT
    rc.name as contract,
    rc.customer,
    rc.contract_start_date,
    rc.contract_end_date,
    rc.billing_type,
    rc.billing_frequency,
    rc.billing_amount,
    rc.status
FROM `tabRental Contract` rc
WHERE rc.status = 'Active'
ORDER BY rc.customer ASC
